_note: stair up/down + direction now come from the architect's Down/Up-to-Attic text on 1.2RMNAMES, detected in dxf_stairs (issue #30). No manual stair entries needed.

openings._note: VR note #25: this wide gap the plotter drew a door leaf on is really an open cased pass-through, not a door -- render it as just an opening (owner: 'there should just be an opening').

up_turns._note: VR#58: L2 up-to-attic is a quarter-turn -- up, landing, then up to the right
